items.description: Items is the list of Gateways.

listResponseMeta.description: ListResponseMeta is common information about the list.

status.description: Status is the current status of the Gateway.

regionRef.description: RegionRef is the reference to the owner Region

nodeRef.description: NodeRef is the reference to the owner Kubernetes node using the UID set by Kubernetes

id.description: ID is a unique Gateway ID

cidr.description: CIDR is the dual-stack CIDR of the Gateway encompassing all the Services addresses serving in it

wireguard.description: Wireguard is the Gateway WireGuard's information

quicv0.description: Quicv0 is the Gateway QUICv0 information

publicIPs.description: PublicIPs is the list of public IPs of the Gateway when connected to by the User clients

hostname.description: Hostname is the public hostname of the Gateway when connected to by the User clients. Currently sed by QUICv0 Gateways.

publicKey.description: PublicKey is the current public key

v4.description: V4 is the IPv4 network address represented as CIDR notation IP address and prefix length (e.g. `192.0.2.0/24`).

v6.description: V6 is the IPv6 network address represented as CIDR notation IP address and prefix length (e.g. `2001:db8::/32`).

page.description: Page is the page number. Starts with zero.

itemsPerPage.description: ItemsPerPage is number of items per page.

totalCount.description: TotalCount is the total count of items that can be obtained.

hasMore.description: HasMore shows whether there a next page is available

uid.description: UID is the unique UUID value for the object assigned by the Cluster. Read-only.

name.description: Name is the name of the object. It must be unique within a certain API/Version/Kind tuple.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp of creation of the object. Read-only.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp of when the object was last updated. Read-only.

displayName.description: DisplayName is the name that can be shown publicly for the object. Doesn't need to be unique.

description.description: Description is used to describe the object in a short sentence. Maximum characters are 1000.

labels.description: Labels is a map of string keys and values to organize objects.

tags.description: Tags is an optional array of tags that classify the Resource.

annotations.description: Labels is a map of string keys and values that can be used to store metadata about the object.

picURL.description: PicURL is the Picture URL of the resource.

resourceVersion.description: ResourceVersion is a unique ID that represent the current version of the resource object. Used by the Cluster to detect updates.

lastResourceVersion.description: LastResourceVersion is the ResourceVersion of the last update of the Resource.

actorRef.description: ActorRef is the object reference to the Actor resource, typically a Session, who is responsible for the current resource change. If ActorRef is not set, then the current change of the resource was done by the Cluster

actorOperation.description: ActorOperation is the gRPC full method triggered by the actorRef to modify the Resource

isSystem.description: IsSystem means that the resource is created by the Cluster and it cannot be managed by the administrators. Read-only.

specLabels.description: SpecLabels is map used internally by the Cluster for quick searches among lists of objects. Read-only.

isUserHidden.description: IsUserHidden means that the resource object is hidden from ordinary Users and should not be exposed via the User APIs.

isSystemHidden.description: IsSystemHidden means that the resource object is hidden by the Cluster and should not be exposed via the APIs.

systemLabels.description: SystemLabels is a similar map to specLabels. Used only by the Cluster.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the API version of the reference resource

kind.description: Kind is the resource kind. A kind is unique per an APIVersion.

uid.description: UID is the resource object UID. A UID is unique across the entire Cluster.

name.description: Name is the resource object name. A name is unique per a certain kind.

resourceVersion.description: ResourceVersion is the resourceVersion of the resource.
